Verify if GeckoDriver is configured correctly; using:
  {
     start_process: true,
     server_path: undefined,
     port: 4444,
     host: 'localhost',
     ssl: false,
     default_path_prefix: '',
     proxy: undefined,
     cli_args: {}
  }
lastError.extraDetail: Set webdriver.log_path in your Nightwatch config to retrieve more logs from GeckoDriver.
